job.headline: MY JOBS
job.subTitle1: Position: Content Creator Experience: 2+ Years in Digital Content Production
job.subTitle2: Position: Thumbnail Designer Experience: 1+ Years in Visual & Graphic Design
job.subTitle3: Position: Video Editor & Post-Production Specialist Experience: 2+ Years in Professional Video Editing
job.subTitle4: Position: AI Workflow Architect & Automation Specialist Experience: 6 Months in AI System Integration & Media Automation
job.subTitle5: Position: Camera Operator & Field Cinematographer Experience: 6 Months in Field Production & Videography
job.note1: - Core Channels Managed: + Trần Quốc Huy Wecommit (~200K Subscribers) — Focus: AI & Tech Content + Trung Bùi (Personal Channel) — Focus: Lifestyle & Travel Vlogs - Tools: ChatGPT/Gemini (Advanced Prompting), NotebookLM, Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Docs,...) - Core Responsibilities: + Trend & Competitor Research: Analysed market data to discover high-demand content gaps in both AI and Travel niches. + Scriptwriting & Hook Engineering: Authored comprehensive, word-for-word video scripts with high-retention 3-second opening hooks. + Content Calendar Planning: Structured multi-platform publishing schedules to ensure a consistent flow of high-quality uploads. + Creative Briefing & Collaboration: Formulated detailed briefs for Video Editors and Thumbnail Designers to maintain visual alignment. - Key Impact: + Audience Scale: Co-developed and maintained community loyalty for a major AI tech channel with nearly 200,000 Subscribers. + AI Integration: Used Generative AI to automate brainstorming and outlining, reducing overall research time by 50%.
job.note2: - Channels Managed: Trung Bùi Channel — Aesthetic and raw travel/lifestyle covers. - Tools: Magnific (AI Asset Generation), YouTube Analytics (CTR Tracking). - Core Responsibilities: + Visual Psychology & Framing: Designed high-contrast layouts and framed focal points to instantly capture viewer attention within 1.5 seconds. + Mobile-First Typography: Engineered bold, clean text overlays ensuring 100% readability and impact even on small mobile screens. - Key Impact: + CTR Elevation: Successfully contributed to lifting the channel's average Click-Through Rate (CTR) through optimized, psychology-backed cover designs. + AI-Enhanced Efficiency: Integrated AI image generation tools (Magnific) to quickly draft custom graphic assets, slashing design prep time by 40%.
job.note3: - Channels Managed: + Trần Quốc Huy Wecommit (~200K Subs) — High-pacing tech & long-form content + Trung Bùi Channel — Cinematic, story-driven travel & lifestyle vlogs - Tools: Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut PC, Adobe After Effect - Core Responsibilities: + Advanced Pacing & Timeline Control: Structured raw footage into high-energy videos and immersive, narrative-driven long-form vlogs + Multi-Format Assembly: Managed complex timelines, ensuring seamless visual transitions, precise jump cuts, and 100% elimination of dead air. + Immersive Sound Design: Layered background music, sound effects (SFX), and voiceovers to amplify emotional impact and maintain viewer engagement. + Workflow Acceleration: Leveraged automated rough-cut systems to handle tedious tasks, maximizing time spent on creative storytelling. - Key impact: + Audience Retention Boost: Significantly enhanced average watch time and viewer retention charts by optimizing video pacing and visual retention hooks. + Project Management Organization: Maintained a flawless file structuring and archiving system, enabling instant team retrieval and seamless re-editing.
job.note4: - Core Systems Built: Automated Generative AI Pipelines for Content Production - Tools: Magnific AI (Video Generation/Upscaling), Gemini Gems (Custom AI Agents), Workflow Automation Flows. - Core Responsibilities: + AI Video Generation & Upscaling: Engineered high-fidelity, customized AI video assets and cinematic sequences utilizing Magnific AI. + Custom Agent Architecture (Gemini Gems): Programmed and deployed specialized Gemini Gems to automate creative brainstorming, research, and structural outlining. + End-to-End Workflow Automation: Built automated logic flows to streamline repetitive production tasks, linking separate tools into a unified, hands-free ecosystem. - Key Impact: + Production Time Slashed: Reduced manual asset preparation and rough-processing time by 50% - 70% through custom automation flows. + Scalable Content Output: Enabled the production pipeline to scale video volume efficiently without increasing cognitive fatigue or manual labor.
job.note5: - Featured Projects: + Cultural & Travel Vlogs: Quảng Phú Cầu Incense Village, Bát Tràng Pottery Village, Personal Lifestyle Vlogs. + Corporate Events: Wecommit Top 1% Secret Event. - Gear: Gimbals, Tripod, DJI Action Camera - Core Responsibilities: + Cinematic Composition & Framing: Captured high-contrast cultural colors at Quảng Phú Cầu and raw textures at Bát Tràng with intentional, storytelling framing. + Dynamic Event Videography: Executed "run-and-gun" shooting styles for the Wecommit Top 1% Secret Event, capturing high-energy, unscripted networking moments perfectly. + Lighting & Environment Control: Adjusted camera settings and manipulated portable lighting to ensure flawless exposure across shifting outdoor sunlight and dim indoor event venues. - Key Impact: + High-Standard Raw Footage: Delivered 100% technically sound raw assets (perfect focus, correct white balance, optimized profiles), reducing color correction time in post-production by 30%. + Versatile Shooting Agility: Proven capability to transition smoothly between slow-paced, aesthetic cultural storytelling and fast-paced, professional corporate event coverage.

project.headline: MY PROJECTS
project.subTitle1: The “Bat Trang Pottery Village” project was my very first filmmaking and editing project.
project.subTitle2: The 'Top 1% Secret' event helped me learn a lot and network with major local and international entrepreneurs.
project.subTitle3: My 'Quang Phu Cau Incense Village' project earned a perfect score in college and put this amazing place on the map.
project.subTitle4: My main goal for this trip to Hue was to showcase the beauty and meaning of Vietnamese heritage attire to the world.
project.subTitle5: This is the moment I'm handing over the 'Ha Long Bay's Beauty' project to my client.
